message: Optimize Mobile Experience
The Cart Ninja app already includes a built-in mobile optimization feature that ensures responsive tap targets and a single-column layout for a seamless shopping experience on mobile devices.
summary: Optimizing mobile experience for better user engagement

message: deactivate cart drawer
To deactivate the cart drawer, go to your Shopify store's settings and locate The Cart Ninja app. Click on 'Disable cart drawer' to remove the feature.
summary: Deactivating the cart drawer will remove the slide-out panel from your Shopify store.

executedActions.impact: Cart drawer turned off — shoppers will use the standard cart page instead.

message: Enable Cart Drawer
The Cart Drawer will be enabled, allowing customers to view and interact with their cart from a slide-out panel. This can improve user experience and increase conversions.
summary: Enabling Cart Drawer to replace the default cart page

executedActions.impact: Keeps shoppers on-page and reduces checkout drop-off — drawer carts typically lift conversion by 5–10%.

message: Add Upsells

Upsell recommendations will suggest related products to customers in their cart, potentially increasing average order value. Would you like to customize the upsell settings or product recommendations?
summary: Upsell recommendations will be enabled in the cart

executedActions.impact: Surfacing related products in the cart can grow average order value by 10–15%.

message: enable and add upsell with ai recommendation

actions.label: Configure Upsell Settings (e.g., product selection, display options)

executedActions.impact: Surfacing related products in the cart can grow average order value by 10–15%.

message: What is my conversion rate?
The Cart Ninja app provides analytics for specific features, but overall conversion rate is not tracked. For detailed analytics, please refer to your Shopify dashboard or third-party analytics tools.
summary: Conversion rate not available in The Cart Ninja app

message: What should I do first?
Consider enabling the Cart Drawer to improve user experience and increase conversions. It's a simple yet effective way to encourage customers to add more items to their cart.
summary: Optimize your cart with a clear call-to-action

executedActions.impact: Keeps shoppers on-page and reduces checkout drop-off — drawer carts typically lift conversion by 5–10%.
Surfacing related products in the cart can grow average order value by 10–15%.

message: Analyze Revenue
To better understand revenue trends, I'd like to access analytics data from The Cart Ninja app. This will help us identify areas for improvement and optimize the cart experience for your customers.
summary: Analyzing revenue to provide recommendations
